# MPMC pretrained pointset
# Contains following parameters (refer to QMCPy's MPMC documentation for more details): 
# 'loss_fn': L2mix_weighted
# 'lr': 0.001
# 'nlayers': 3
# 'weight_decay': 1e-06
# 'nhid': 32
# 'nbatch': 16
# 'epochs': 200000
# 'start_reduce': 100000
# 'radius': 0.35
# 'weights': 1110000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000000
# 'n_projections': 15
52 #d, the number of dimensions
16 #n, the number of points
